name: Duke Breast MRI
description: Differentiate between four breast cancer molecular subtypes on MRI
reference: Saha, A., Harowicz, M.R., Grimm, L.J., Kim, C.E., Ghate, S.V., Walsh, R. and Mazurowski, M.A., 2018. A machine learning approach to radiogenomics of breast cancer: a study of 922 subjects and 529 DCE-MRI features. British journal of cancer, 119(4), pp.508-516.

values.0: Luminal A, ER and/or PR positive, HER2 negative
values.1: Luminal B, ER and/or PR negative, HER2 positive
values.2: HER2, ER and PR negative, HER2 positive
values.3: Triple negative, ER, PR and HER2 negative
